$comment: OPTIONAL Claude Design add-on. This adapter makes the brand's components available as a live, on-brand library in claude.ai/design via the /design-sync skill. It is one more consumer of the canon — never mandatory. Everything brand- or stack-specific is confined to this adapter directory; no canon layer references it. Fill the {{...}} fields, then run /design-sync from the component-kit directory.
projectId: {{set after the target Claude Design project is created/chosen}}
